title: GO India RIDE
shortDescription: Book rides, track drivers live, manage wallet payments and receive ride alerts.
fullDescription: GO India RIDE helps customers book cab rides, verify phone ownership with OTP, track assigned drivers during active trips and receive important ride updates.
Drivers can use the app surfaces for dashboard access, live location sharing during duty and trip status updates.
The app uses secure backend APIs for booking, wallet payments, OTP verification, push notifications and live trip tracking.
